verdict.summary: Guide is broadly accurate for daily use, but it overstates acceptance, uses confusing Multibanco/POS wording, and lacks precise official sources/caveats for bank support and MB WAY.

issues.current: «Apple Pay и Google Pay работают везде, где терминал принимает contactless»
issues.problem: Too absolute. Apple Pay/Google Wallet payments are tokenised card payments over the relevant card scheme, typically Visa/Mastercard. A contactless symbol alone does not guarantee that a terminal/acquirer/merchant accepts the card scheme, foreign-issued cards, mobile-wallet tokens, or online wallet checkout. In Portugal some merchants still describe acceptance as “Multibanco” and may not accept all Visa/Mastercard or international cards.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Apple Pay и Google Wallet обычно работают на POS/TPA-терминалах, которые принимают бесконтактные Visa/Mastercard вашей карты; в редких случаях терминал, эквайер или продавец может не принять конкретную карту/кошелёк.»
issues.source: Banco de Portugal — pagamentos contactless; Apple Pay participating banks/cards; Google Wallet supported payment methods

issues.current: «Multibanco-терминалы нового типа — если включён contactless у конкретного эквайера»
issues.problem: Confusing terminology. In Portugal “Multibanco” often means the SIBS ATM/service-payment network, while card-acceptance terminals in shops are POS/TPA. Apple Pay/Google Wallet are for card-present POS payments, not for most Multibanco ATM/service-payment operations. Contactless ATMs or Multibanco-branded infrastructure should not be presented as a normal Apple Pay/Google Pay acceptance case.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «POS/TPA-терминалы в магазинах — если они принимают бесконтактные Visa/Mastercard. Для операций Multibanco вроде entidade + referência, pagamentos ao Estado и некоторых ATM-сценариев обычно нужны MB WAY, карта или приложение банка.»
issues.source: SIBS / MB WAY; Banco de Portugal payment terminology

issues.current: «многие бытовые платежи — luz, água, telecomunicações, impostos — идут через entidade + referência в Multibanco/MB WAY»
issues.problem: Mostly right for utility/service bills, but misleading for taxes. Portuguese tax payments are often made via “Pagamentos ao Estado” / Documento Único de Cobrança / AT payment reference, not always via the ordinary entidade + referência flow used for service payments.
issues.suggestion: Write: «luz, água, telecomunicações часто оплачиваются через entidade + referência; налоги и сборы — через Pagamentos ao Estado/AT или специальную referência de pagamento. Apple Pay/Google Wallet это не заменяют.»
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária — pagamentos; Banco de Portugal/SIBS Multibanco payment categories

issues.current: List of banks: «CGD, Millennium bcp, Santander Portugal, ActivoBank, Banco Best, Revolut, Wise, N26, Openbank…»
issues.problem: The wording is appropriately cautious, but support for Apple Pay and Google Wallet changes by issuer, card network, card type and country of issuance. Because this is a sensitive practical claim, the guide should cite the official Apple and Google supported-bank/card lists or the banks’ own pages, not only generic Apple/Google home/support URLs.
issues.suggestion: Add a sentence and sources: «Перед открытием счёта проверяйте актуальные списки Apple Pay / Google Wallet и страницу конкретного банка: поддержка зависит от продукта карты.» Use official participating-bank/card pages for Apple Pay and Google Wallet plus bank pages for CGD, Millennium bcp, Santander, ActivoBank and Banco Best.
issues.source: Apple — Bancos participantes no Apple Pay; Google Wallet Help — supported payment methods/banks

issues.current: «Apple Support Portugal — Apple Pay, настройка и использование», url: «https://support.apple.com/pt-pt»
issues.problem: The URL is too generic for the claims being made. It does not directly substantiate Portuguese Apple Pay bank/card support or setup instructions.
issues.suggestion: Use direct Apple Support pages for Apple Pay setup/use and the participating banks/cards list for Portugal, rather than the generic support landing page.
issues.source: Apple Support — Apple Pay setup/use; Apple Support — participating banks in Europe/Portugal

issues.current: «Google Pay / Google Wallet — справка и поддерживаемые способы оплаты», url: «https://pay.google.com»
issues.problem: The URL is too generic and does not directly verify Portuguese Google Wallet contactless support or issuer/card eligibility.
issues.suggestion: Use direct Google Wallet Help pages for supported countries/payment methods and contactless setup/troubleshooting, plus issuer pages where needed.
issues.source: Google Wallet Help — supported payment methods; Google Wallet Help — pay contactless

issues.current: «MB WAY — местная система SIBS, привязанная к португальскому номеру телефона и банковской карте.»
issues.problem: Potentially too rigid without caveat. In practice MB WAY requires association with a mobile number and a participating Portuguese bank/card, and a Portuguese mobile number is the normal/expected setup path, but exact acceptance of non-Portuguese numbers can depend on the bank/app flow.
issues.suggestion: Write: «MB WAY — система SIBS, привязанная к мобильному номеру и карте/счёту участвующего банка; на практике для экспатов обычно проще использовать португальский номер +351, но детали зависят от банка.»
issues.source: MB WAY official FAQ; participating bank onboarding rules

missing_topics: MB WAY fees and limits are bank-dependent; transfers/payments may have limits and, in some cases, bank commissions.
For Apple Pay/Google Wallet acceptance, distinguish POS/TPA card payments from Multibanco service payments, ATM operations and MB WAY flows.
Add direct official Apple/Google supported-bank/card sources and direct bank pages for the listed Portuguese banks.
